title: アオハル杯4戦目・勇気をもらって

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: We did it! We won... together!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I was cheering my heart out during everyone
else's races...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
And afterwards, one of the girls told me they
heard me and felt a surge of energy because of
my cheering!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It might not have been much... but I'm glad I was
able to help our team.
